description: Style NoteInspired by the shimmering hues of the amethyst gemstone, the bulgari Omnia Amé thyste, captures the myriad scents of iris, pink grapefruit, green sap and bulgarian rosebuds caressed with morning dew.  Quantity: 65 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
